name: CardLink
description:
Props for the CardLink component.
Extends standard anchor element attributes with additional styling and behavior options.

props.name: asChild
props.description:
When true, renders the child element as the link instead of wrapping it in an anchor tag.
Uses Radix UI's Slot pattern for component composition.

props.name: cardClickable
props.description:
When true, expands the clickable area to cover the entire parent Card.
The Card must have `position: relative` (which it does by default) for this to work.
Creates a pseudo-element overlay that captures clicks while maintaining accessibility.

props.name: children
props.description:
Content to render inside the link. Can be text or React elements.
When `cardClickable` is true, this is typically the card's title or heading.

props.name: styleOf
props.description:
Typography style to apply to the link text.
Uses design system text tokens for consistent typography.

name: Card
description:
`Card` is a container component that provides a styled surface with rounded corners and drop shadow.
Use `Card` to group related content and create visual hierarchy.
The companion `CardLink` component enables clickable card patterns.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to render inside the card. Can be any React node including text, components, or complex layouts.

props.name: html
props.description:
The underlying HTML element to render. Defaults to `li` for list semantics.
Use `div` for general containers, `section` for thematic content groupings, or `article` for self-contained content.

props.name: rowContainer
props.description: When true, removes internal padding. Use when the card contains `Row` components that handle their own padding.

props.name: variant
props.description: Background color variant. Primary uses the default surface color, secondary uses a disabled/muted surface color for less emphasis.

name: TextButton
description: Tertiary action button with no border or fill, styled as text. Use for low-emphasis actions (e.g., Cancel, Skip).

props.name: children
props.description: String or react/HTML element passed as a child element to the component

props.name: disabled
props.description: Semantically disables the button, and applies "grayed out" styles.

name: OutlinedButton
description: Secondary action button with an outlined border and no fill. Use for secondary actions alongside a ContainedButton.

props.name: children
props.description: String or react/HTML element passed as a child element to the component

props.name: disabled
props.description: Semantically disables the button, and applies "grayed out" styles.

props.name: icon
props.description: icon name to be included

props.name: isVisibleLabel
props.description: Shows the text added by the label prop and adjusts styles to accommodate the text.

props.name: label
props.description: Adds a visually hidden text to the button that describes the action of the button.

props.name: labelStyle
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

name: ContainedButton
description: Primary action button with a solid filled background. Use for the main call-to-action on a page (e.g., Submit, Sign in, Get started).

props.name: children
props.description: String or react/HTML element passed as a child element to the component

props.name: disabled
props.description: Semantically disables the button, and applies "grayed out" styles.

name: Button
description: Callout/annotation button for informational messages (info, tip, caution, warning). NOT for user actions — use ContainedButton, OutlinedButton, or TextButton instead.

props.name: children
props.description: String or react/HTML element passed as a child element to the component

props.name: disabled
props.description: Semantically disables the button, and applies "grayed out" styles.

props.name: asChild
props.description:
When true, renders the child element instead of an anchor tag, passing all props to it.
Use for custom link components like React Router `Link` or Next.js `Link`.

props.name: children
props.description: The text content displayed for the breadcrumb link. Should be concise and describe the navigation destination.

props.name: icon
props.description:
Icon displayed before the link text.
Defaults to `ArrowLeft`. Use icons from `@sofi-web-ui/icons` like `ChevronRight` or `HomeFilled`.

props.name: styleOf
props.description:
Typography style variant for the link text. Defaults to `bodyMedium`.
Use smaller styles like `bodySmall` for compact layouts.

props.name: children
props.description:
One or more `BreadcrumbLink` components representing each level in the navigation hierarchy.
The last link should have `aria-current="page"`.

props.name: children
props.description: String or React/HTML element passed as a child element to the component

props.name: icon
props.description: Allows for an icon to be used.

props.name: isFullWidth
props.description: Changes the styles for a full width banner

props.name: onMouseEnter
props.description: Custom function

props.name: onMouseLeave
props.description: Custom function

props.name: role
props.description: The value on aria attribute role - either status or alert

props.name: styleType
props.description: Sets the style of the banner, INFO, TIP, CAUTION, WARNING.

props.name: contentStyle
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

props.name: iconStyle
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

props.name: isOverlaid
props.description: Whether the banner should pull upwards to overlap the preceding element. Useful when placed immediately after a Card.

props.name: animate
props.description: When true, enables smooth open/close transitions. Use for better UX in most cases.

props.name: children
props.description: The collapsible content revealed when accordion is open. Can include any React elements.

props.name: className
props.description: Glassbox session recording control. Use `sr-mask` to hide sensitive content from recordings.

props.name: style
props.description: StyleX styles for the panel content container. Use for padding or background customization.

props.name: children
props.description: The button label text or elements. Should clearly describe the content being revealed.

props.name: styleOf
props.description: Typography style for the button text. Defaults to `labelLarge`.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant. Must match parent `Accordion` variant for consistent styling.

props.name: contentStyle
props.description: StyleX styles for the text content container. Use for text alignment or spacing.

props.name: svgStyles
props.description: StyleX styles for the chevron icon. Use to customize icon color or size.

props.name: children
props.description: Must include `AccordionButton` and `AccordionPanel` as children.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant. Use `transparent` for minimal styling, `solid` for emphasis, or `info` for educational content.

props.name: loading
props.description: If the input is in a loading state

props.name: style
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

props.description: String or React/HTML element passed as a child element to the component

props.name: childrenStyle
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

props.name: children
props.description: Selected value displayed to the user.

props.name: label
props.description: Label for select

props.name: childrenStyle
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

props.name: labelStyle
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

props.name: wrapperStyle
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

props.name: iconStyle
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

props.name: children
props.description:
Custom security message text.
Defaults to "We use bank-level TLS 1.2 encryption to keep your data safe."

props.name: style
props.description: StyleX styles for customizing the banner appearance.

props.name: files
props.description: Array of file states to render as rows. Managed by `useFileUpload` hook.

props.name: file
props.description: The file state object containing upload status, progress, and metadata.

props.name: maxSizeMB
props.description: Maximum file size in MB. Used to display error messages for oversized files.

props.name: style
props.description: Custom StyleX styles for the file row container.

props.name: href
props.description: URL to navigate to when the file row is clicked (for completed uploads).

props.name: target
props.description: Link target attribute (e.g., '_blank' for new tab).

props.name: onClick
props.description: Callback fired when the file row is clicked.

props.name: canRemoveFile
props.description: When true, shows the remove/cancel button. Defaults to true.

props.name: accepts
props.description:
File types to accept. Use `'images-jpg-png'` for JPEG/PNG, `'images-all'` for all images,
or pass a custom array of MIME types.

props.name: buttonText
props.description: Custom text for the upload button. Defaults to 'Upload from your device'.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, disables the drop area and upload button.

props.name: dropAreaStyle
props.description: Custom StyleX styles for the drop area container.

props.name: helperText
props.description:
Helper text displayed below the upload button.
Defaults to auto-generated text based on `accepts` and `maxSizeMB`.

props.name: maxSizeMB
props.description: Maximum file size allowed in megabytes.

props.name: multiple
props.description: When true, allows multiple file uploads. When false, upload is disabled after one file.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired when files are selected via drag-drop or file picker.

props.name: required
props.description: When true, indicates the field is required for form validation.

props.name: uniqueId
props.description: Unique identifier for the file input element. Auto-generated by `useFileUpload`.

props.name: label
props.description: Adds a label to the skeleton that describes what is loading.

props.name: loading
props.description: If the input is in a loading state

props.name: frequencies
props.description: A set of allowed frequencies for the options. If not provided, all default frequencies will be shown.

props.name: onClick
props.description: A function to be called when the input is clicked

props.name: enableOneTimeFuture
props.description: If false, will default to "Today" instead of showing the calendar for the 'Once' frequency option

props.name: calendarType
props.description: The type of calendar to display - 'calendar' shows the full Calendar component, 'simple-calendar' shows a generic 31-day grid

props.name: secondarySelection
props.description: Maps a custom frequency's `startText` to its secondary selection config.

props.name: anchor
props.type: false | (("top" | "right" | "bottom" | "left") | "selection" | "top start" | "top end" | "right start" | "right end" | "bottom start" | "bottom end" |...

props.name: inlineLabel
props.description:
When true, adjusts the dropdown positioning to account for inline label layout.
Should match the `inlineLabel` prop on ComplexSelectButton.

props.name: emptyContent
props.description:
Content to display when there are no options available.
Only shown when children is null/empty.

props.name: startText
props.description: Selected value displayed to the user. Defaults to placeholderText if undefined.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional icon displayed to the left of startText

props.name: iconTitle
props.description: Optional title for the icon

props.name: placeholderText
props.description: Placeholder for select

props.name: label
props.description: Label for select

props.name: startTextStyle
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

props.name: endTextStyle
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

props.name: labelStyle
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

props.name: isSelectOpen
props.description: If one of the ComplexSelectSwitchOptions is open

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Callback for when one of the select options is opened

props.name: uniqueOptionsGroupId
props.description: Unique id for the group of options which controls transition when account groups are switched

props.name: loading
props.description: If the input is in a loading state

props.name: isFirst
props.description: If the button is the first in the set, applies the correct top border styles

props.name: children
props.description:
ComplexSelectOption components to render as selectable options.
Can also include custom content or be null/empty when using emptyContent.

props.name: className
props.description:
CSS class name. Only Glassbox masking class ('sr-mask') is allowed.
Use the StyleX `style` prop for custom styling.

props.name: style
props.description: StyleX styles to customize the options container appearance.

props.name: inlineLabel
props.description:
When true, adjusts the dropdown positioning to account for inline label layout.
Should match the `inlineLabel` prop on ComplexSelectButton.

props.name: emptyContent
props.description:
Content to display when there are no options available.
Only shown when children is null/empty.

props.name: children
props.description: The option's display text or content.

props.name: childrenStyle
props.description: StyleX styles to customize the children text appearance.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional icon displayed to the left of the option text.

props.name: iconTitle
props.description: Accessible title/label for the icon.

props.name: endText
props.description:
Secondary text displayed on the right side of the option.
Commonly used to show additional info like account balances or status.

props.name: secondaryText
props.description: Secondary node that appears below the main text

props.name: secondaryTextColor
props.description: Color for secondary text - accepts any content color token (e.g., 'contentDanger', 'contentCaution', 'contentSecondary')

props.name: disabled
props.description:
When true, prevents selection and applies disabled styling.
Disabled options remain visible but are not selectable.

props.name: children
props.description: String or React/HTML element passed as a child element to the component

props.name: childrenStyle
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

props.name: text
props.description: Text to display on the action button

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click handler for the action button

props.name: children
props.description:
The `ComplexSelect` and its child components (`ComplexSelectButton`, `ComplexSelectOptions`).
Must include a `ComplexSelect` component as a child.

name: ComplexSelect
description:
`ComplexSelect` is an advanced select component built on Headless UI Listbox.
It supports icons, secondary text, action buttons, loading states, and inline labels.

Use `ComplexSelectContainer` as the wrapper, `ComplexSelect` for state management,
`ComplexSelectButton` for the trigger, and `ComplexSelectOptions`/`ComplexSelectOption` for the dropdown.

props.name: value
props.description: The currently selected value

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback when a new value is selected

props.name: actionButton
props.description: Optional action button configuration

props.name: children
props.description: Selected value displayed to the user.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional icon displayed to the left of children when a value is selected.

props.name: iconTitle
props.description: Accessible title/label for the icon.

props.name: endText
props.description:
Secondary text displayed next to the chevron icon.
Commonly used to show additional info like account balances.

props.name: errorText
props.description:
Error message to display below the input.
When provided, applies error styling (red border) and shows the error text.

props.name: helperText
props.description:
Helper text displayed below the input in smaller text.
Use for tips, hints, or additional guidance. Hidden when errorText is present.

props.name: placeholderText
props.description: Text shown when no value is selected.

props.name: id
props.description:
Unique identifier for the input.
Auto-generated if not provided.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, prevents interaction and applies disabled styling.

props.name: review
props.description:
When true, displays the select in a read-only review state.
Used for confirmation screens where editing is not allowed.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed above or inline with the select. Required for accessibility.

props.name: childrenStyle
props.description: StyleX styles to customize the selected value text appearance.

props.name: endTextStyle
props.description: StyleX styles to customize the endText appearance.

props.name: labelStyle
props.description: StyleX styles to customize the label appearance.

props.name: inlineLabel
props.description: When true, displays the label inline with the selected value for a compact layout.

props.name: loading
props.description:
When true, shows a loading skeleton inside the button.
Use while fetching options data.

props.name: forceChevronOpen
props.description:
Force the chevron to point up (open state).
Useful when displaying content other than ComplexSelectOptions (e.g., Calendar)
and you want a visual indication that something is open.

props.name: style
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

props.name: style
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

props.name: label
props.description: Adds a label to the skeleton that describes what is loading.

props.name: style
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

props.name: hasValue
props.description: Whether the combobox has a value selected

props.name: loading
props.description: If the input is in a loading state

props.name: labelProps
props.description: Props for the underlying <label>

props.name: style
props.description: StyleX styles - can be used to overwrite or add styles to the component.

props.name: immediate
props.description: Whether the combobox should show options immediately on focus without requiring input
